title: James B. King
content:

'''James B. King''' was an author and illustrator for [[West End Games]].

{{Bio-stub}}

==Sources==
===''Star Wars''===
*[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]

===Unlicensed material===
*''[[Challenge 35]]'' - "Team Recovery" and "The [[BTS-A2 Long-Range Strike Fighter/Bomber|H-Wing Strike Fighter]]"
*''[[Challenge 40]]'' - "[[Blaster/Legends|Blaster]] Weapons of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]"
*''[[Challenge 61]]'' - "Rogue Metal"
*''[[Challenge 65]]'' - "Shadow of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]]"
*[[Shadis 14|''Shadis'' 14]]
*[[Voyages SF 7|''Voyages SF'' 7]] - "The [[Anatra Dora]]" and "Carrier Assignment"
*[[Voyages SF 8|''Voyages SF'' 8]] - "Rebel Justice"
*[[Voyages SF 9|''Voyages SF'' 9]] - "A World in Revolt"
*[[Voyages SF 11|''Voyages SF'' 11]] - "A Day at the Auction"
